'''''Blessings''''' was the name of a [[Dreadnaught/Legends|Dreadnaught]] of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] design employed by the [[Yevetha]] during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]].

==History==
It is unclear whether the ''Blessings'' was a warship assigned by the Yevetha to the [[Black Eleven Fleet]]. In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], the ''Blessings'' failed to perform adequately in training exercises, and thus was excluded from participation in the [[Yevethan Purge]]. [[Dar Bille]] executed both the ship's commanding [[Primate (Yevethan rank)|primate]] and his [[Second (Yevethan)|second]]. A new primate was appointed, and instructed to prepare for another training exercise after the return of the rest of the fleet.

In [[17 ABY/Legends|17 ABY]], the ''Blessings'', like all other Imperial-type vessels under Yevethan control, was taken over by surviving Black Sword personnel and withdrawn from Koornacht to the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]

==Behind the scenes==
The ''Blessings'' is only briefly mentioned in dialogue in the novel ''[[Before the Storm]]''. The ship's full name is presumably ''Blessings of Yevetha'', following their usual pattern for captured Imperial vessels.

The ship's identification as a [[Dreadnaught/Legends|Dreadnaught]] and the association with the [[Black Eleven (shipyard)|Black Eleven]] shipyard only appear in subsequent reference works such as the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.

The capture of the ''Blessings'' is inferred from the events of the novel ''[[Tyrant's Test]]''. The ship presumably joined up subsequently with one of the [[replacement warlord]]s or surrendered to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].
